seoTitle: Lingxing IC Solutions - Precision Measurement, Data Acquisition Solutions
seoDescription: Explore Lingxing IC application solutions including precision sensor measurement, multi-channel data acquisition, and signal conditioning. LiTong provides complete analog IC solutions.

faqs.question: What solutions does Lingxing IC offer?
faqs.answer: Lingxing IC offers comprehensive analog IC solutions for precision measurement and data acquisition: Precision Sensor Measurement Solutions using 24-bit sigma-delta ADCs with integrated PGAs for weigh scales, pressure sensors, and temperature measurement. Multi-Channel Data Acquisition Solutions using 16-bit SAR ADCs with multiplexers for industrial monitoring and control systems. Signal Conditioning Solutions using precision op-amps and instrumentation amplifiers for sensor interfaces. Each solution includes complete reference designs, software drivers, and application support to accelerate product development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review our solution offerings below to find the right fit for your application, or contact our FAE team for customized solution recommendations.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Lingxing IC solution for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Lingxing IC solution depends on your measurement requirements: For high-precision sensor measurement (weigh scales, pressure, temperature), use the Precision Sensor Measurement Solution with 24-bit ADC. For multi-channel monitoring and control, use the Data Acquisition Solution with 16-bit SAR ADC. For signal conditioning and buffering, use the Signal Conditioning Solution with precision op-amps. Consider these factors: Required resolution and accuracy. Number of channels to measure. Sampling rate requirements. Sensor type and output range. Operating environment (temperature, noise). Our FAE team can help analyze your requirements and recommend the optimal solution architecture.
faqs.decisionGuide: Match solution type to your measurement needs. Contact LiTong FAE team for solution architecture guidance.

faqs.question: Does Lingxing IC provide reference designs for their solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lingxing IC provides comprehensive reference designs for all their solutions: Hardware reference designs with schematics, PCB layouts, and BOMs. Software reference code including drivers and example applications. Application notes detailing implementation best practices. Evaluation boards for quick prototyping and testing. Reference design contents: Complete circuit diagrams with recommended component values. PCB layout guidelines for signal integrity and noise reduction. Microcontroller interface examples. Software drivers for popular platforms. Configuration and calibration procedures. The reference designs are validated and tested, providing a proven starting point for your design. Our FAE team can provide additional support for customizing reference designs to your specific requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request reference designs from LiTong. Contact our FAE team for customization support.

solutions.title: Precision Sensor Measurement Solution
solutions.description: A complete precision measurement solution using Lingxing IC 24-bit sigma-delta ADC with integrated PGA for high-accuracy sensor interfaces. This solution provides exceptional resolution, low noise, and flexible gain settings for weigh scales, pressure sensors, temperature measurement, and bridge sensors.
features: Low noise: 40nV RMS at high gain

customerCase.title: Hardware Design Engineer
customerCase.description: An industrial equipment manufacturer implemented a high-precision weigh scale system using Lingxing IC LX2448 ADC for their packaging machinery.
challenges: Noisy industrial environment with motor interference
customerCase.solution: The LX2448 24-bit ADC with integrated PGA was selected for its low noise and high resolution. PGA=128 provided optimal signal conditioning for the 2mV/V load cell. Differential inputs and careful PCB layout minimized noise pickup.
results: Reliable operation in noisy industrial environment
30% cost reduction compared to previous solution
customerCase.testimonial: The Lingxing IC solution exceeded our accuracy requirements while reducing cost. The local FAE support from LiTong was invaluable during development.
customerCase.author: Wang Jun

faeInsights.overview: As an FAE supporting precision measurement applications for over 8 years, I've helped numerous customers implement high-resolution sensor measurement systems. This solution addresses the most common precision measurement needs in industrial and instrumentation applications.
keyConsiderations: Match PGA gain to sensor output for optimal noise performance
Use differential inputs to reject common-mode noise
Implement proper PCB layout with star grounding
Select appropriate output data rate for noise vs speed trade-off
Use external precision reference for highest accuracy
commonPitfalls: Insufficient PGA gain resulting in poor noise performance
Single-ended inputs in noisy environments causing erratic readings
Inadequate power supply decoupling increasing noise
Ignoring thermal drift in high-precision applications
Poor PCB layout causing ground loop issues
bestPractices: Always use differential inputs for bridge sensors
Implement RC filters on analog inputs for noise reduction
Use low-noise LDO for ADC power supply
Calibrate system at multiple temperatures for accuracy
Implement digital filtering for additional noise reduction
customizationOptions: Different PGA gain settings for various sensor types
Internal or external reference based on accuracy needs
Multiple output data rates for noise optimization
Various package options for space constraints
faeInsights.content: Based on extensive experience supporting customers with Precision Sensor Measurement Solution, this solution addresses critical design challenges through proven architecture. The implementation achieves optimal balance between performance, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

faqs.question: What types of sensors work best with this solution?
faqs.answer: The Precision Sensor Measurement Solution works with various sensor types: Load cells and weigh scales - ideal for the high resolution and PGA gain. Pressure sensors - both bridge and amplified types. Temperature sensors - thermocouples, RTDs, thermistors. Strain gauges - for force and torque measurement. Bridge sensors - any Wheatstone bridge configuration. Sensor requirements: Output voltage within PGA-adjusted range (typically mV to V). Bridge configuration (2mV/V, 3mV/V typical for load cells). Stable excitation voltage. The 24-bit resolution enables measurement of microvolt-level signals, making it suitable for sensors with very low output levels. The integrated PGA eliminates the need for external amplification in most cases.
faqs.decisionGuide: Works with any bridge sensor or low-level voltage output sensor. Contact our FAE team for sensor compatibility.

faqs.question: How do I calibrate the measurement system?
faqs.answer: Calibrating the precision measurement system involves several steps: Zero calibration: Apply zero load/pressure/temperature. Read ADC output. Store zero offset value. Subtract from all future readings. Span calibration: Apply known full-scale input. Read ADC output. Calculate gain factor. Store calibration coefficient. Linearization (if needed): Apply multiple known inputs. Create lookup table or polynomial. Compensate for sensor non-linearity. Temperature calibration: Calibrate at multiple temperatures. Store temperature coefficients. Apply compensation in software. Calibration procedure: Ensure stable conditions during calibration. Use reference standards traceable to NIST. Take multiple readings and average. Store calibration data in non-volatile memory. Verify calibration with check points. The LX2448's excellent linearity (±10ppm) minimizes the need for linearization in most applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Implement zero and span calibration for accuracy. Contact our FAE team for calibration procedures.

faqs.question: What is the achievable accuracy with this solution?
faqs.answer: The achievable accuracy depends on multiple factors: ADC performance: 24-bit resolution, ~20 effective bits. ±10ppm INL linearity. Low noise with proper filtering. System factors: Sensor accuracy and stability. Reference voltage accuracy. Temperature drift. Noise and interference. Calibration quality. Typical achievable accuracy: Weigh scales: 1/10,000 to 1/20,000 of full scale. Pressure sensors: 0.05% to 0.1% of full scale. Temperature: 0.1°C to 0.5°C (depending on sensor). Voltage measurement: 0.01% to 0.05% of reading. To maximize accuracy: Use external precision reference (<5ppm drift). Implement temperature compensation. Use proper shielding and grounding. Perform regular calibration. Use appropriate filtering and averaging. The solution provides the precision needed for most industrial and instrumentation applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Achievable accuracy 0.01% to 0.1% depending on implementation. Contact our FAE team for accuracy optimization.

solutions.name: Industrial Control Solution 1
solutions.longDescription:
The Industrial Control Solution 1 from lingxingic represents a comprehensive approach to addressing modern challenges in Industrial. This solution integrates advanced semiconductor technology with robust design methodologies to deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

At the core of this solution is a carefully selected portfolio of lingxingic components optimized for the target application. The design leverages the latest advances in power management, signal processing, and thermal management to achieve industry-leading efficiency and performance metrics.

Key technical features include high-efficiency power conversion, precise control algorithms, and comprehensive protection mechanisms. The solution supports wide operating ranges and maintains performance across varying environmental conditions. Advanced monitoring and diagnostic capabilities enable predictive maintenance and optimize system uptime.

Implementation is streamlined through comprehensive design support including reference designs, simulation models, and detailed application notes. BeiLuo's FAE team provides expert guidance throughout the development cycle from concept through production. Customization options are available to address specific application requirements.

The solution has been validated through extensive testing including functional verification, environmental stress screening, and long-term reliability assessment. Field deployment data demonstrates consistent performance and high customer satisfaction across diverse applications and operating conditions.
